        ```code
        import java.util.*;
import java.io.*;

public class Valley {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
        File myObj = new File("valley.in");
        Scanner myReader = new Scanner(myObj);
        List<Long> list = new ArrayList<>();
        int n = myReader.nextInt();
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            list.add(myReader.nextLong());
        }

        // Calculam costurile de escavare de la stanga la dreapta
        List<Long> costDreapta = new ArrayList<>();
        costDreapta.add(0L);
        long last = list.get(0);
        for (int i = 1; i <= n - 1; i++) {
            costDreapta.add(costDreapta.get(i - 1) + Math.max(list.get(i) - last, 0));
            last = Math.min(last, list.get(i));
        }

        // Calculam costurile de escavaare de la dreapta la stanga
        List<Long> costStanga = new ArrayList<>();
        costStanga.add(0L);
        last = list.get(list.size() - 1);
        for (int i = n - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
            costStanga.add((costStanga.get(n - 1 - i - 1) + Math.max(list.get(i) - last, 0)));
            last = Math.min(last, list.get(i));
        }

        // Verificam care suma a aceleasi indexuri este cea mai mica
        long min = Long.MAX_VALUE;
        for (int i = 1; i < n - 1; i++) {
            if (costDreapta.get(i) + costStanga.get(n - i - 1) < min) {
                min = costDreapta.get(i) + costStanga.get(n - i - 1);
            }
        }

        PrintWriter writer = new PrintWriter(new FileWriter("valley.out"));
        writer.print(min);
        writer.close();

    }
}
        ```
